description_long: This is a rectangular, modern wooden cabinet with a light oak finish, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design. The front face displays three rectangular cutouts at the top, likely for cable management or ventilation, and a single horizontal groove suggesting a drop-down or pull-out door. The back side has a large recessed opening, possibly for access to the interior or for mounting purposes. Both side panels are solid and unadorned, matching the wood grain pattern of the rest of the cabinet. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a flat top surface suitable for supporting objects such as electronics or decor. The cabinet is likely designed for wall-mounting, making it ideal for use as a media console or storage unit in urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A light oak-finished, rectangular wall-mounted cabinet with minimalist lines, front cutouts, and a single horizontal groove. It features a flat top and a recessed back opening, suitable for use as a media console or storage unit.
description_view_0: Front view showing three rectangular cutouts at the top and a horizontal groove, indicating a possible drop-down or pull-out door.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid wood panel with visible grain, no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a large recessed opening, likely for mounting or cable access, with the same wood finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, solid wood panel.
